cells.rationale: Subtle re-fold-deterministic correctness invariant (stale-replay stamp gate + subagent-yield guard on the jobs fold) is a hard opus gate, and mutating a deterministic-replayed projection is contract-shaped enough for xhigh despite the small surface.

Cross-cutting multi-file new-pattern producer with a novel synthetic-event fold arm, sticky-until-ack distress semantics, and false-positive-on-live-session correctness risk — a named intelligence-bound, contract-shaped opus/xhigh task.
